title: Acakids
description: Acaprov the 5* A Cappella Improvised Musical present AcaKids: The Improvised A Cappella Kids Show! Their ideas, our performers, a musical we create together! Beatboxing, rap, body-percussion, singing, dance, acting and impro in this spontaneous AcaKids adventure where everything is possible. Shouting out is not a problem, it will keep us on our toes - we are all playing together in OUR musical where anything goes!
content_warnings: The nature of improvising with children means that we have no idea or control over what they will say - but we will deal swiftly with any issues that arise as we have several teachers in the cast
